1.description: Select parcels in Drammen (kommunenummer) larger than 5000 m² and return geometry and id

2.description: Select 200-year flood zones (return period 200) for Drammen municipality and return geometry and id

3.description: Select quick-clay hazard zones (kvikkleire) for Drammen and return geometry and id

4.description: Find parcels that intersect 200-year flood zones

5.description: Compute distance from those parcels to nearest quick-clay hazard zone and sort ascending

6.description: Sort parcels by nearest quick-clay distance ascending

7.description: Return top 10 parcels with required attributes

iterations.ai_content:
I will discover the kommuner database catalog to get the municipality identifier for Drammen, then plan a multi-database workflow: (1) query parcels filtered by kommunenummer and area>5000, (2) query 200-year flood zones for Drammen, (3) query quick-clay hazard zones for Drammen, (4) spatially join parcels with flood zones, (5) compute nearest distance from resulting parcels to quick-clay zones, (6) sort by distance ascending and limit to 10.

Emitting plan now, then will validate the first SQL.
